title: Update tests if behavior changes require it
summary: Assess and update tests for path resolution and CWD validation changes to ensure correct behavior and maintain coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Tests updated or added for any code changes introduced in v0.4.3.
Path resolution and CWD validation behavior is covered.

steps.description: Identify behavior changes introduced in v0.4.3 that require test updates.
Add or update unit/integration tests to cover path resolution and CWD validation.
Run the test suite and confirm coverage remains >= 90%.
